summary: Iteration 49: Phase 3 Biometric Clock-In Infrastructure - All features verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: restaurants.py: SecuritySettingsUpdate model (lines 165-168) correctly defines biometric_required, photo_audit_enabled, photo_retention_days
restaurants.py: GET /restaurants/my/security (lines 171-184) returns security settings with defaults
restaurants.py: PUT /restaurants/my/security (lines 187-202) requires admin role, updates security_settings in MongoDB
attendance.py: ClockMeRequest.biometric_verified (line 30) is Optional[bool] with default False
attendance.py: Biometric check (lines 226-228) fires when biometric_required=true AND biometric_verified is falsy
attendance.py: Attendance record includes biometric_verified field (line 284) when clocking in
biometric.js: Exports isBiometricAvailable() and requestBiometric() functions
biometric.js: Gracefully returns true on web (non-native) for requestBiometric
biometric.js: Returns false for isBiometricAvailable on web
StaffClockIn.js: Loads security settings on mount (lines 31-35)
StaffClockIn.js: Shows biometric badge when biometricRequired=true (lines 236-240)
StaffClockIn.js: Calls requestBiometric before clock action when required (lines 86-95)
RestaurantSettings.js: Anti-Theft card with biometric toggle (lines 768-817)
seed_data_creation: Device binding reset for 'user' account during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified Phase 3 Biometric Clock-In Infrastructure: (1) GET/PUT /api/restaurants/my/security works correctly with biometric_required, photo_audit_enabled, photo_retention_days fields. (2) PUT security settings requires admin role (staff gets 403). (3) POST /api/attendance/clock-me rejects with 403 when biometric_required=true and biometric_verified is false/missing. (4) POST /api/attendance/clock-me succeeds when biometric_verified=true. (5) Attendance record includes biometric_verified field. (6) Settings > Security tab shows Anti-Time Theft card with biometric toggle, photo audit toggle, device binding info. (7) Staff Clock-In page shows biometric badge when biometric_required=true. (8) Biometric utility exports isBiometricAvailable and requestBiometric functions. (9) Switch component properly imported in RestaurantSettings.js. (10) Geofence coordinates for testing: lat=51.5074, lng=-0.1278. (11) biometric_required reset to false after testing.

clock_me_rejects_without_biometric.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock-me returns 403 when biometric_required=true and biometric_verified is false/missing

clock_me_succeeds_with_biometric.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock-me succeeds when biometric_verified=true with matching geofence coordinates

clock_me_works_without_biometric_when_no.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock-me works without biometric when biometric_required=false

attendance_record_biometric_field.evidence: Attendance record includes biometric_verified field when clocked in

settings_anti_theft_card.evidence: Settings > Security tab shows Anti-Time Theft card with data-testid='anti-theft-card'

settings_biometric_toggle.evidence: Biometric toggle found with data-testid='biometric-toggle', state toggles correctly

settings_photo_audit_toggle.evidence: Photo audit toggle found with data-testid='photo-audit-toggle'

settings_device_binding_info.evidence: Device Binding: Active info section found in Anti-Theft card

staff_clock_in_biometric_badge.evidence: Staff Clock-In page shows biometric badge with text 'Biometric required (not available on this device)' when biometric_required=true

biometric_utility_exports.evidence: biometric.js exports isBiometricAvailable() and requestBiometric() functions

switch_component_import.evidence: Switch component properly imported in RestaurantSettings.js (line 11)

mocked_apis_list: Capacitor BiometricAuth plugin only works on native devices. Web browser returns true (allowed through) for requestBiometric and false for isBiometricAvailable.
